summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all major requirements: manifest parsing (both formats), license compliance checking, report generation, formatting, and workflow structure validation. Includes 31 unit tests following TDD methodology plus integration tests via act. Excellent end-to-end coverage with specific output assertions. Minor gaps: malformed JSON input not tested, some edge cases around unusual version specifiers, no pytest fixtures (uses module constants instead). Well-organized by feature rounds with clear docstrings. Would reliably catch regressions in core functionality.
